plan_items.title: Frontend Infrastructure Setup (React 18 + Vite)
plan_items.goal: Create ALL foundational React 18 + Vite files required before any page can run. This item MUST be completed first and completely. Includes: package.json, framework config with /api/* proxy, entrypoint, router / app shell with routes for all pages, base HTTP client (RELATIVE URLs ONLY), auth state management, nginx.conf (proxy /api/* → backend), multi-stage Dockerfile, and frontend service in docker-compose.yml. READ these context files before implementing: `docs/uiux/design-contract.md`, `docs/uiux/api-contract.yaml`, `docs/uiux/component-guide.md`.

design_specs.critical_constraint: NEVER use build-time env vars for the API URL (VITE_API_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL, NG_APP_API_URL, etc.). ALL HTTP calls MUST use RELATIVE paths (/api/...). The web server (nginx or framework dev proxy) routes /api/* to the backend container.
design_specs.proxy_pattern: Dev: framework config proxy (vite server.proxy, next.config rewrites, angular proxy.conf.json, etc.). Prod: nginx location /api/ { proxy_pass http://backend:23001/api/; }
design_specs.api_client: One shared api.ts (or api.js) module that ONLY uses relative paths. All pages/components import from this module — no direct fetch() calls in UI code.
design_specs.pages: InicioHome, CatlogodeProductos, DetalledeProducto, CarritodeCompras, LoginPage, RegisterPage, ProductListPage, ProductDetailPage, OrderHistoryPage, OrderDetailPage

files.purpose: react@18, react-dom@18, react-router-dom@6, @tanstack/react-query@5, axios. DevDeps: vite, @vitejs/plugin-react, typescript, @types/react, @playwright/test. Scripts: dev, build, preview, test:e2e.
plugins=[react()], server.proxy={ '/api': { target: 'http://backend:23001', changeOrigin: true } }. NO define block with API URLs.
TypeScript strict config, jsx: react-jsx, paths alias @/* → src/*.
<div id='root'> + <script type='module' src='/src/main.tsx'>
Bootstrap: ReactDOM.createRoot.render(<QueryClientProvider><BrowserRouter><AuthProvider><App /></AuthProvider></BrowserRouter></QueryClientProvider>)

<Routes> with one <Route> per page: /iniciohome, /catlogodeproductos, /detalledeproducto, /carritodecompras, /login, /register, /productlist, /productdetail, /orderhistory, /orderdetail. Catch-all → NotFoundPage. Protected routes wrapped in <RequireAuth>.
Base HTTP client. ONLY relative URLs. Reads JWT from localStorage('token'). Attaches Authorization: Bearer. Throws ApiError(message, status) on non-2xx.
React context: { user, token, login(), logout() }. Exports useAuth().

nginx: root /usr/share/nginx/html; try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html (SPA). location /api/ { proxy_pass http://backend:23001/api/; proxy_set_header Host $host; proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr; } listen 80.
Stage 1 (node:20-alpine AS builder): npm ci + npm run build. Stage 2 (nginx:alpine): COPY dist → /usr/share/nginx/html + nginx.conf. EXPOSE 80.
Add 'frontend' service: build: { context: ./frontend }, ports: ['3000:80'], depends_on: [backend], network: project_network. NO API_URL env vars in the environment block.

plan_items.validation: frontend/package.json exists. A framework config file exists (vite.config.*, next.config.js, angular.json, svelte.config.js, nuxt.config.ts, or equivalent). grep -rn 'http://localhost\|http://backend\|http://127\|API_URL' frontend/src returns ZERO matches — all API calls use relative paths. frontend/nginx.conf exists with proxy_pass for /api/. frontend/Dockerfile exists with at least two FROM stages (builder + runtime). docker-compose.yml has a 'frontend:' service entry with no *_API_URL environment vars.

plan_items.title: Frontend E2E Tests — Full-Stack Integration
plan_items.goal: Write Playwright E2E tests that drive real browser UI events and verify correct backend API responses. RULES: (1) Each test navigates to a real page. (2) Uses page.click()/fill()/select() to trigger actions. (3) Uses page.waitForResponse() to intercept and assert the correct API endpoint was called with correct payload. (4) Asserts backend response data appears in DOM. NO MOCKS — tests hit the real backend via docker-compose. API contract at `docs/uiux/api-contract.yaml`.

design_specs.no_mocks: NEVER use page.route() to return fake data — always let requests reach the real backend
design_specs.auth_pattern: await page.evaluate(() => localStorage.getItem('token')) to assert JWT stored

files.purpose: Register new user → intercept POST /api/auth/register, assert 201. Login → intercept POST /api/auth/login, assert token stored in localStorage. Access protected route → assert Authorization header sent. Logout → assert localStorage cleared.

Load product list → waitForResponse(/\/api\/products/), assert items rendered. Click product card → waitForResponse(/\/api\/products\/.+/), assert detail shown. Search/filter if UI has it → assert query params sent.

Full checkout flow: add item → go to cart → click checkout → waitForResponse(/\/api\/orders/), assert POST body has cart items. Order history → waitForResponse GET /api/orders, assert list rendered. Order detail → assert GET /api/orders/:id data shown.

Playwright config: baseURL='http://localhost:3000', testDir='./e2e', timeout=30000. Reference docs/uiux/api-contract.yaml for endpoint paths. No webServer block — assume docker-compose up is run externally.

plan_items.validation: playwright.config.ts exists with baseURL. Each spec file imports from @playwright/test only — no MSW, no fetch-mock. Tests use page.waitForResponse() to assert API calls — not just page.goto(). No hardcoded http://localhost:PORT in test assertions — use baseURL. Auth spec asserts localStorage contains token after login.
